headline: Modular Flooring Market Report 2026 - Global Forecast to 2031 with Mohawk Industries, Shaw Industries Group, and Tarkett Leading
summary: The modular flooring market is anticipated to rise from USD 14.01 billion in 2026 to USD 16.48 billion by 2031, at a CAGR of 3.3%. This growth is driven by enhanced acoustic performance, comfort requirements, and the increasing demand in workplaces, healthcare, and education infrastructure. The ceramic segment, projected as the second-largest product type, is favored for its durability and low maintenance, especially in high-traffic and moisture-prone areas.
